[[File:Light ballista detail.png|left|200px]]
The '''light ballista''' is a two-handed [[Crossbow (weapon)|crossbow]] that uses [[javelin]]s as ammunition, requiring level 65 in [[Ranged]] to wield.

It is created by using [[ballista limbs]] on a [[light frame]], then using the resulting [[incomplete light ballista]] on a [[ballista spring]], and finally adding a [[monkey tail]] on an [[unstrung light ballista]]. This process requires 47 [[Fletching]] and grants 330 experience.

==Special attack==
[[File:Concentrated Shot (light ballista).gif|thumb|250px|A player performing the light ballista's special attack, ''Concentrated Shot''.]]
The light ballista has a [[special attack]], ''Concentrated Shot'', which it shares with the [[heavy ballista]]. It performs an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage and uses 65% of the player's special attack energy.

==Changes==
{{Subject changes header}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 29 May 2024
|update = Project Rebalance: Combat Changes
|change = [[Ava's devices]] now pick up [[Javelins]]
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 1 December 2016
|update = Ballista Rework & QOL
|change = The light ballista's ranged attack bonus was changed from 75 to 110. Its level requirement was also increased from 30 to 65 [[Ranged]] to wield. The light ballista can now fire javelins up to Dragon.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 31 October 2016
|change = The delay between the projectile hitting the player and the damage hitsplat appearing has been removed. Previously, there was a delay that allowed a ballista hit and other weapon special attacks to stack in quick succession.
}}
{{Subject changes footer}}

==Trivia==
*The special attack tooltip stating that it has a 2.4 second delay to attack is false; there is no extra delay associated with the special attack.
